summary: Excellent script and workflow. Bash uses set -euo pipefail, proper variable quoting, and graceful error handling via die(). Workflow uses pinned action refs (v4), minimal permissions, sensible triggers (push/PR/schedule/dispatch), idempotent steps. Script is well-modularized (parse_package_json, parse_requirements_txt, lookup_license, is_in_list) with clear separation of concerns. Comments explain design decisions (mockable DB, TSV format, literal grep for safety). No dead code, repetition appropriate to format differences. Workflow's conditional shellcheck is pragmatic. Show inputs step aids debugging without overhead. Testable fixture-based design with clear exit codes (0=pass, 1=denied, 2=error). No violations detected.
